title.heading: Hesed's Inversion Quest
title.subtitle:
You asked: "Do you think I'll be a good dad someday?"
I made you a quest to answer it.

quests.name: The Practice Yard
quests.intro: A Glitch of Neglect has made this villager fade away. He just needs someone to show up.
npcDialogue: I've been fading... nobody shows up anymore.
They all say they'll come, but nobody does.
Can you just... stay here with me? That's all I need.
quests.completionMessage: You showed up. You stayed. The Glitch of Neglect is broken.
quests.shardLesson: THE ANCHOR: What makes a man fail his people? Being someone they can't count on when things get hard. Don't be a 'maybe' guy. When you say 'yes,' mean it. When life gets crazy, be the one who stays calm so others feel safe.

quests.name: The Safe Cave
quests.intro: Wild Fire grows when you rush in. This creature needs a protector, not a destroyer.
npcDialogue: The fire... it grows when people rush in angry.
Everyone who tried to help me just made it worse.
Can you be calm? Can you move slowly and clear the way?
quests.completionMessage: You used your strength to protect, not to destroy. The Volatile Fire is out.
quests.shardLesson: REGULATED STRENGTH: What makes a man dangerous to the people he loves? Having power but no control over his feelings. A real protector doesn't just know how to fight. He refuses to use his strength to scare people. Control your temper so your family feels safe, not afraid.

quests.name: Banner Hill
quests.intro: A Wall of Isolation blocks the path. You can't break it alone. Find your brother.
npcDialogue: I've been stuck behind this wall for a long time.
I tried to do everything alone. That's why I'm trapped.
Will you help me carry this weight? Together we can break through.
quests.completionMessage: You carried the heavy end of the log. The Wall of Isolation crumbles.
quests.shardLesson: THE CONNECTOR: What makes a man lonely and weak? Thinking he has to do everything by himself. Lone wolves don't last. Be a teammate. Listen more than you talk. If you see someone struggling, help carry their weight. To lead a family, you have to learn to serve the team first.

quests.name: The Glitch Portal
quests.intro: A Cloud of Deception obscures the path. Only truth can cut through lies.
npcDialogue: This fog is made of small, convenient lies.
Every lie that seems harmless makes the fog thicker.
Only the truth can burn it away. Are you brave enough?

mechanicConfig.question: The Guardian speaks: "You broke something that belonged to someone you love. Nobody saw it happen. What do you do?"

choices.text: Hide it and hope nobody notices.
choices.response: The fog grows thicker. Small lies always grow into big ones.

choices.text: Tell them the truth, even though it's hard.
choices.response: The fog burns away! Truth is the shortest distance between you and the people you love.
The fog grows thicker. Blame is just fear wearing a mask.

quests.completionMessage: You chose truth when it cost you something. The Cloud of Deception is gone.
quests.shardLesson: THE TRUTH-BEARER: What destroys trust faster than anything? Small lies that hide who you really are. Don't cover up your mistakes to look perfect. A great man is honest even when it's hard. When you're wrong, say so right away. Truth is the fastest way to stay close to the people you love.

quests.name: The Listening Garden
quests.intro: The Silent Monk holds the final shard. He only gives it to those who truly listen.
npcDialogue: The Fire Ninja was not born powerful. He trained every single day.
His greatest weapon was not fire. It was his willingness to learn.
He once said: 'The day I stop learning is the day I start losing.'

mechanicConfig.question: What did the Fire Ninja say was the day he would start losing?

choices.text: The day he lost his fire powers.
The day his enemies got stronger.

mechanicConfig.retryMessage: You weren't really listening. Let me tell you again...

quests.completionMessage: You listened. You proved you can learn. The Monk smiles.
quests.shardLesson: THE ETERNAL STUDENT: What makes a man fall behind? Thinking he already knows everything. Don't be the guy who stops learning. Ask questions. Read. Watch. A real man is never 'done.' Keep growing every single day. You never stop.

badge.title: Good Dad Badge
badge.message:
Son, you asked if you'll be a good dad.
Here's the cheat code: Flip it.
Ask, "What would make me a terrible man?"

1. Don't be the guy who doesn't show up.
   Be the anchor people can hold onto.

2. Don't lose control of your temper.
   Use your strength to protect, never to scare.

3. Don't try to do everything alone.
   Be the teammate who carries the heavy end.

4. Don't hide behind lies.
   Tell the truth, even when it's hard.

5. Don't stop learning.
   Stay curious every single day.

If you dodge those five traps, you won't just be a good dad - you'll be a leader people would follow into the fire.

I already see that spark in you, Hesed.
Be better than me.
I love you.
